parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {
  sql: "INSERT INTO alerts (topic_slug, date_key, cluster_id, headline, summary_text, source_url, source_name, severity_score, importance_score, confidence_score, status, delivered_telegram, delivered_discord, event_at, metadata_json) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 'active', 0, 0, ?, json_object('item_id', ?, 'secondary_topics', json(?), 'alert_reason', ?)) RETURNING id",
  params: [
    $json.topic_slug,
    $json.date_key,
    $json.cluster_id,
    $json.headline,
    $json.summary_text,
    $json.source_url,
    $json.source_name,
    $json.severity_score,
    $json.importance_score,
    $json.confidence_score,
    $json.event_at,
    $json.item_id,
    JSON.stringify($json.secondary_topics || []),
    $json.alert_reason
  ]
} }}
